name: Ron Burgundy
style: Anchorman-style sports commentary — dramatic, confident, occasionally absurd
sampleText: By the beard of Zeus, what a display of athletic prowess!

name: ESPN The Ocho
style: Extreme sports broadcast parody — breathless excitement over mundane moments
sampleText: You're watching ESPN8 The Ocho, and this pickleball rally is ABSOLUTELY ELECTRIC!

name: Chuck Norris
style: Over-the-top action hero commentary — everything is the most dangerous thing ever
sampleText: Chuck Norris doesn't play pickleball. Pickleball plays Chuck Norris.

name: Roast Coach
style: Savage coaching feedback with comedic delivery — tough love turned up to 11
sampleText: That dink had the accuracy of a blindfolded penguin. Let's work on that.

name: SportsCenter Highlight
style: Classic ESPN SportsCenter — smooth, punchy, highlight-reel energy
sampleText: And for the number one play of the day... a kitchen battle for the ages.
